headline: 3 Retail Stocks to Watch After Crushing Q1 EPS Expectations: FIVE, ULTA, VSXY
summary: Ulta Beauty benefited from resilient demand for beauty products, Victoria's Secret continued its successful turnaround, and Five Below delivered another quarter of exceptional growth.
